title: Full-Scale Parking System
description: A comprehensive parking management platform with real-time slot tracking, booking system, and admin dashboard. Built with modern web technologies and deployed for production use in the UK.

title: Perfumes E-Commerce Store
description: Custom Shopify store with integrated payment processing, inventory management, and automated workflows for a Canadian perfume brand.

title: Human Identification System
description: AI-powered system using computer vision and deep learning for human identification. Implemented custom neural network architectures with PyTorch and OpenCV.

title: NeoFood Store
description: Full-featured food ordering and delivery platform with Shopify backend, custom theme development, and seamless checkout integration.

title: Classification Systems with Custom Neural Networks
description: Built and trained custom neural network architectures from scratch for multi-class classification tasks. Achieved high accuracy with optimized hyperparameters.

title: Skincare Website - Rejins Wellness
description: Professional skincare brand website with product showcases, booking system, and custom e-commerce integration built for an international client.

title: MongoDB Database Engine from Scratch
description: Built a complete database management system in C++ implementing B-tree indexing, query parsing, CRUD operations, and file-based storage — understanding databases at the lowest level.

title: FAT Filesystem & File Sharing System
description: Operating systems project implementing FAT filesystem from scratch, with network file sharing capabilities. Deep dive into OS internals and systems programming.

title: Multiplayer Chess & Ludo
description: Real-time multiplayer board games (Chess & Ludo) built in C++ with networking support, game state management, and an interactive terminal UI.

title: Fullstack Airbnb & Management Systems
description: Complete Airbnb clone with property listing, booking management, user authentication, reviews system, and admin dashboard — end-to-end full-stack development.
